channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Bangladesh, IMF discuss new three-year reform programme

Importance: 73.1 | Covered by: 7 feeds | Reputation: 6.2

Matched titles:
- Bangladesh, IMF agree on new realistic 3-year reform programme
- Bangladesh, IMF agree on new funding prog

- Bangladesh, IMF agree to work on new reform-focused programme
- Bangladesh, IMF agree on new realistic 3-year reform programme
- Bangladesh, IMF agree to work on new reform-focused programme
- Bangladesh, IMF agree to work on new reform-focused program
